business.title: Will Stronger Semiconductor and Data Center Demand Plus Margin Initiatives Change Advanced Energy Industries' (AEIS) Narrative?
business.description:
Advanced Energy Industries recently reported quarterly results that surpassed the midpoint of its guidance, supported by stronger-than-expected demand in its semiconductor and data center markets, alongside progress in factory consolidation and cost initiatives.
A key takeaway is the company’s emphasis on design wins and manufacturing transitions aimed at lifting gross margins toward its longer-term target above 40%, which could be important for how investors assess its profitability...

business.title: Is Salesforce (CRM) Now Attractive After A 25% Year To Date Share Price Decline?
business.description:
This article examines whether Salesforce, at around US$189.80, represents a bargain or a value trap by exploring what the current price implies about the company.
Over the last week the stock returned 6.9%. The 30 day return is a 2.8% decline, the year to date return is a 25.2% decline, and the 1 year return is a 23.7% decline.
Recent coverage has focused on how Salesforce fits into wider themes in software, including customer relationship management, cloud based tools and artificial...

science.title: This simple fatty acid could restore failing vision
science.description: Scientists at UC Irvine have found a way to potentially reverse age-related vision loss by targeting the ELOVL2 “aging gene” and restoring vital fatty acids in the retina. Their experiments in mice show that supplementing with specific polyunsaturated fatty acids—not just DHA—can restore visual function and even reverse cellular aging signs.
